spans: section 5.1 household preferences, budget constraint, capital accumulation, labor packing, and wage setting
section 5.2 final-good aggregation, intermediate production, neutral technology, and Calvo price setting

section 5.4 stationarization, state vector, structural shocks, volatility shocks, innovations, and observables
